ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US shoe size */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU shoe size (can be a range or single value) */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "au_size" REAL /* AU shoe size */,
  "jp_size" REAL /* JP shoe size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of the size (e.g., Men's, Women's, Children's) */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is available for customization */,
  "conversion_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale settings for the region */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Default shipping cost for the region */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in this size */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product size is on discount */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage */,
  "is_out_of_stock" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product size is out of stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size available in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product size */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the next shipment */,
  "is_backordered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product size is backordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the product size was sold */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sale was at a discounted price */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied during the sale */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product was returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., retail associate, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the access failure (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "size_purchased" TEXT /* Size of the product purchased */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for how well the product fit (1-5) */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the comfort of the product (1-5) */,
  "durability_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the durability of the product (1-5) */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the value for money of the product (1-5) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been approved for publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
